notes:
Location: Professor Oak's Lab, Pallet Town.
OBJECTIVE: Exit the lab.
STATUS: COMPLETELY STUCK. Tried all movements, all NPC interactions (Oak, woman), all objects (desk, counter, rug, pillar), menu buttons (A, B, Start), and waiting. No response from the game. It appears to be a broken state or a bug.
summary:
Location: Professor Oak's Lab, Pallet Town.
OBJECTIVE: Exit the lab / progress the game.
STATUS: I discovered that interacting with the two NPCs on the right side of the lab triggers conversations. I successfully interacted with both NPCs, receiving different dialogue from each. However, after each conversation completes, a loading bar appears and then the game loops back to the beginning of the conversation. The conversations seem incomplete/broken as they don't lead to any game progression.
WHAT WORKED: Pressing A to interact with NPCs, advancing dialog with A, waiting during loading bars.
WHAT DIDN'T WORK: All movement, all menu buttons, interacting with objects (refrigerator, desk, etc.), any actions that don't involve talking to the two NPCs on the right.
NEXT OBJECTIVE: Try interacting with the NPCs again but look for any new options or changes, or try pressing B during/after the conversation to see if there are menu options, or try moving to different positions in the lab before interacting with them.
